_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY. The REAL file lives at %LOCALAPPDATA%\OTGW-capture\capture-settings.json (outside the repo, never synced to GitHub). capture-mqtt-debug.bat writes DeviceHost/BrokerHost/BrokerPort/Topic/Username automatically; pass -SaveSecrets once to also persist MqttPassword there for unattended runs. Add WifiSsid/WifiPassword/Hardware by hand if you want the test scripts to use them. Every key can also be supplied via an env var (see scripts/_secrets.py).
MqttPassword: set-via -SaveSecrets, never commit a real value
